RicinMod:ChronoStrike.NAME: Chrono Strike
RicinMod:ChronoStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal damage equal to turn count × !M!. NL ricinmod:Echo : Deal turn count × !M! damage.

RicinMod:StarlightStrike.NAME: Starlight Strike
RicinMod:StarlightStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL ricinmod:Echo : Deal !M! damage to a random enemy.

RicinMod:ConstellationDefend.NAME: Constellation Defend
RicinMod:ConstellationDefend.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL ricinmod:Echo : Gain !M! Block.

RicinMod:Memento.NAME: Memento
RicinMod:Memento.DESCRIPTION: ricinmod:Eternalize !M! card in hand, draw 1 card.

RicinMod:Whisper.NAME: Whisper
RicinMod:Whisper.DESCRIPTION: ricinmod:Lament 1 , ricinmod:Charon the rightmost card in the echo bar.

RicinMod:EmberWake.NAME: Ember Wake
RicinMod:EmberWake.DESCRIPTION: Whenever a card is ricinmod:Charon'd , gain 1 Energy.
RicinMod:EmberWake.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: ricinmod:Innate. NL Whenever a card is ricinmod:Charon'd , gain 1 Energy.

RicinMod:StakingStardust.NAME: Staking Stardust
RicinMod:StakingStardust.DESCRIPTION: Draw cards until your hand is full. NL Each time you play this card, it costs 1 more.
RicinMod:StakingStardust.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Draw cards until your hand is full. NL Each time you play this card, it costs 1 more.
